task_completion.description: Open a new Daily chart for SPY
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'SPY' and a daily timeframe indicator (e.g., 'Daily', '1 Day', or 'D') in the window header or tab.

task_completion.description: Add the SampleMACrossover strategy to the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Strategies' configuration window is open, and 'SampleMACrossover' is present in the 'Configured' list (typically in the bottom-left section of the window).

task_completion.description: Configure the Fast and Slow parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the properties grid on the right side of the Strategies window, the 'Fast' parameter is set to '15' and the 'Slow' parameter is set to '50'.

task_completion.description: Set the account to Sim101 and enable the strategy
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the properties grid of the Strategies window, the 'Account' field is set to 'Sim101' and the 'Enabled' checkbox is checked (or set to True).

task_completion.description: Save the workspace to persist the configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Workspaces' menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center is open with the 'Save' option highlighted/clicked, or the active workspace name at the bottom right of the Control Center is shown without a grey asterisk (which would indicate unsaved changes).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NinjaTrader 8 GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual NinjaTrader 8 desktop application interface being used, rather than a terminal, script execution, or text editor modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: The SPY chart successfully loaded the data
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart window displays actual price action (candlesticks or bars) for SPY, rather than a blank grid, confirming the data was properly loaded.

integrity.description: Strategy parameters were configured via the standard UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameters (Fast=15, Slow=50, Account=Sim101) are visible inside the NinjaTrader Strategies properties grid, not just typed into a search bar or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instrument: SPY. Strategy: 'SampleMACrossover' (verified as a built-in NinjaTrader 8 strategy). Account: 'Sim101' (verified as the default simulated trading account in NinjaTrader 8).
